name: Classic Potato Chips
notes: Per 28g serving: 160 cal, 10g fat, 2g protein, 15g carbs, 1g fiber, 1g sugar. 2.625 oz = 74.4g = 2.657 servings. Whole bag: 160 x 2.657 = 425 cal. DB value of 420 is very close. Confirmed accurate.

name: Nacho Cheese Tortilla Chips
notes: Per 28g serving: 150 cal, 8g fat, 2g protein, 18g carbs, 1g fiber, 0.5g sugar. 2.75 oz = 78g = 2.786 servings. Whole bag: 150 x 2.786 = 418 cal. DB value of 410 is close. Confirmed accurate.

name: Flamin' Hot Crunchy
notes: Per 28g serving: 170 cal, 11g fat, 1g protein, 15g carbs, 1g fiber, 0g sugar. 2 oz = 56.7g = 2.025 servings. Whole bag: 170 x 2.025 = 344 cal. DB value of 320 is ~7% low. Should be updated to 344.

name: Fuego Rolled Tortilla Chips
notes: EatThisMuch lists the 90g bag (3.17oz) at 460 cal for the whole bag. The standard retail bag is labeled 3.25oz but may contain ~90g. Per 28g serving: 140 cal, 8g fat, 2g protein, 16g carbs, 1g fiber, 1g sugar. DB value of 490 is high vs 460 verified. Updating to 460.

name: Cheddar & Sour Cream Potato Chips
notes: Per 28g serving: 160 cal, 10g fat, 2g protein, 15g carbs, 1g fiber, 1g sugar. 2.5 oz = 70.9g = 2.532 servings. Whole bag: 160 x 2.532 = 405 cal. DB value of 400 is very close. Confirmed accurate.

name: Original Crisps
notes: Per 28g serving: ~150 cal, 9g fat, 1g protein, 15g carbs, 1g fiber, 0g sugar. 2.5 oz = 70.9g = 2.532 servings. Whole can: 150 x 2.532 = 380 cal. DB value of 375 is very close. Confirmed accurate.

name: Original Cheese Crackers
notes: Per 30g serving (27 crackers): 150 cal, 8g fat, 3g protein, 17g carbs, 0.5g fiber, 0g sugar. 3 oz = 85g = 2.833 servings. Whole bag: 150 x 2.833 = 425 cal. DB value of 410 is ~4% low but within tolerance. Confirmed.

name: Harvest Cheddar Whole Grain Snacks
notes: Official SunChips site and PepsiCo School Source confirm 210 cal per 1.5 oz bag. DB is exact match. Confirmed accurate.

name: Scoops! Tortilla Chips
notes: DB says 280 cal for 28g but actual is 140 cal per 28g serving. DB value is exactly DOUBLE the correct amount — likely a data entry error where 2 servings were counted as 1. CRITICAL FIX NEEDED.

name: Cheddar Crackers
notes: EatThisMuch and Campbells Food Service show 210 cal for 1.5 oz pouch. DB says 200 which is 5% low. Updating to 210.

name: Cheddar Cheese Pretzel Pieces
notes: Per 28g serving: 140 cal, 7g fat, 2g protein, 17g carbs, 0g fiber, 1g sugar. 1.75 oz = 49.6g = 1.771 servings. Whole bag: 140 x 1.771 = 248 cal. DB value of 250 matches. Confirmed accurate.

name: Cinnamon Sugar Pretzel Pieces
notes: Per 28g serving: 140 cal, 7g fat, 2g protein, 17g carbs, 0.5g fiber, 4g sugar. 1.75 oz = 49.6g = 1.771 servings. Whole bag: 140 x 1.771 = 248 cal. DB value of 250 matches. Confirmed accurate.

name: Everything Pretzel Pieces
notes: Snyder's currently only makes '50% Less Fat Everything' (130 cal/28g). The regular pretzel pieces across flavors are consistently 140 cal per 28g. Using standard pretzel pieces profile: 140 x 1.771 = 248 cal. DB value of 245 is close. If this is the 50% Less Fat version (130 cal/28g), bag would be 230 cal. Confirmed within tolerance.

name: Baked Naturals Sesame Sticks
notes: Per 31g serving (12 sticks): 140 cal, 5g fat, 4g protein, 20g carbs, 2g fiber, 1g sugar. 1.75 oz = 49.6g = 1.6 servings. Whole bag: 140 x 1.6 = 224 cal. DB value of 226 matches. Note: This product is discontinued/archived but nutrition data is still valid. Confirmed accurate.
